name: mobbin-mcp
description: Search Mobbin design references and capture flows, screens, and site sections into a project-aware local store.
long_description: A local-first Mobbin integration. Search Mobbin's apps, screens, flows, sites, filters, and collections, then capture flows, screens, and site sections directly into a project-aware store your agent can reuse through prompts, contact sheets, visual similarity, and PR reference packs. Mobbin has no public API; this server uses your own authenticated Mobbin session.

tools.name: mobbin_search_screens
tools.description: Search Mobbin screens by pattern, app, and platform.

tools.name: mobbin_search_flows
tools.description: Search Mobbin user flows across apps.

tools.name: mobbin_capture_flow_from_search
tools.description: Capture a Mobbin flow into the local project store with ordered steps and metadata.

tools.name: mobbin_capture_screen_from_search
tools.description: Capture a Mobbin screen into the local project store.

tools.name: mobbin_get_capture_catalog
tools.description: List captured design references for the current project.

tools.name: mobbin_generate_feature_prompt
tools.description: Generate an implementation/analysis prompt from captured references.

mobbin_auth_cookie.title: Mobbin auth cookie
mobbin_auth_cookie.description: Paste your Mobbin Supabase auth cookie pair (sb-...-auth-token.0=...; sb-...-auth-token.1=...) from a logged-in Mobbin browser session. Leave blank if you have already authenticated once by running: npx -y @aos-engineer/mobbin-mcp auth

data_dir.title: Data directory (optional)
data_dir.description: Where captured artifacts and auth are stored. Defaults to ~/.mobbin-mcp.
